title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures ﬂuctuate was relatively small in the morning, but it rose significantly in the end of the day, the main contractI2309 closed 812. an increase of 3.44% throughout the day. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
